rag_rules: Repair only clauses that reference visible AADL features or locally declared eq helpers; delete clauses with unresolved identifiers.
Ensure numeric range guarantees use real or integer literals matching the port type, and bind them to boolean helper expressions.
generic_rules: Fix type mismatches by aligning helper declarations with the expression's actual type, not assumed type.
Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables; they are not in scope unless exposed via ports or constants.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq name : type = expression; to define boolean range checks before guarantees.
Guarantees must reference only visible outputs, inputs, or locally declared eq/const variables.
anti_patterns: Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers or property names not declared in the AADL model.
Never repair by adding new subcomponent paths or architecture elements—only edit existing annex content.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables chunk 1
